seoTitle: Quandong vs Quantong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Quandong and Quantong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Quandong and Quantong.
heading: Quandong vs Quantong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Quandong, Victoria and Quantong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Quantong has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Quandong (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Quandong or Quantong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Quandong has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Quantong scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Quandong scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Quantong scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Quandong or Quantong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Quantong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
